req.title: Appointment scheduling
req.statement: A patient shall schedule an appointment at least 24 hours in advance during provider's available slots.
error_pathways: 422 when slot unavailable or in past

doc.reasoning: The requirement constrains appointment scheduling to: (1) authenticated patients only, (2) slots that are at least 24 hours in the future, (3) slots that are available in the provider's calendar. Three partitions emerge: valid future slot (>24 h), invalid past/too-soon slot (<24 h), and the exact 24-hour boundary. A fourth negative case covers an already-taken slot. State transitions are: unauthenticated -> authenticated -> slot selected -> appointment created / rejected. Decision table covers the two input conditions (time offset valid, slot available) with four rule combinations collapsed to three representative tests plus one DT case. The violation in test[5] was that kind=negative with heuristic=STC is disallowed; STC (State Transition Coverage) is appropriate for positive state-flow tests. The unauthenticated test is a negative/security test best classified under NEG heuristic, which is corrected here.

tests.name: test_schedule_appointment_valid_future_slot
preconditions: Patient is authenticated (valid JWT in session)
Provider has an open slot at least 48 hours from now
No existing appointment occupies that slot
actions: Select an available provider slot 48 hours in the future
expected: HTTP 201 or UI confirmation message is displayed
Appointment record appears in patient's appointment list
trace: R-HLT-024: slot within allowed future window
tests.executable:
import pytest
from datetime import datetime, timedelta, timezone

def test_schedule_appointment_valid_future_slot(auth_client, available_slot_factory, appointment_list, get_provider_notification):
    slot_time = datetime.now(timezone.utc) + timedelta(hours=48)
    slot_id = available_slot_factory(slot_time)

    response = auth_client.post(
        "/appointments",
        json={"slot_id": slot_id, "notes": "routine check"}
    )

    assert response.status_code == 201, f"Expected 201, got {response.status_code}"
    body = response.json()
    assert body["status"] == "booked"
    assert body["slot_id"] == slot_id

    appointments = appointment_list(auth_client)
    assert any(a["slot_id"] == slot_id for a in appointments)

    notification = get_provider_notification(slot_id)
    assert notification is not None, "Provider was not notified"

tests.name: test_schedule_appointment_less_than_24h_returns_422
preconditions: Patient is authenticated (valid JWT in session)
A slot exists but starts only 12 hours from now
actions: Attempt to select a slot 12 hours in the future
expected: Response body contains error code indicating slot is too soon
trace: R-HLT-024: error pathway - slot in past or within 24-hour window
R-HLT-024: 422 when slot unavailable or in past
tests.executable:
import pytest
from datetime import datetime, timedelta, timezone

def test_schedule_appointment_less_than_24h_returns_422(auth_client, available_slot_factory, appointment_list):
    slot_time = datetime.now(timezone.utc) + timedelta(hours=12)
    slot_id = available_slot_factory(slot_time)

    response = auth_client.post(
        "/appointments",
        json={"slot_id": slot_id}
    )

    assert response.status_code == 422, f"Expected 422, got {response.status_code}"
    body = response.json()
    assert "error" in body or "detail" in body

    appointments = appointment_list(auth_client)
    assert not any(a["slot_id"] == slot_id for a in appointments), "Appointment must not be created"

tests.name: test_schedule_appointment_exactly_24h_boundary_accepted
preconditions: Patient is authenticated (valid JWT in session)
A slot exists starting exactly 24 hours and 1 minute from now (on-point)
actions: Select the slot at now + 24 h 01 min
expected: Appointment is created with status booked
trace: R-HLT-024: boundary - minimum valid advance notice (just above 24 h)
R-HLT-024: appointment created for on-point boundary value

tests.name: test_schedule_appointment_exactly_at_24h_rejected
preconditions: Patient is authenticated (valid JWT in session)
A slot exists starting exactly 23 hours 59 minutes from now (off-point)
actions: Select the slot at now + 23 h 59 min
expected: Response indicates the slot does not meet the 24-hour advance requirement
trace: R-HLT-024: boundary - slot just below 24-hour minimum
R-HLT-024: 422 when slot in past or within advance window

tests.name: test_schedule_appointment_unavailable_slot_returns_422
preconditions: Patient is authenticated (valid JWT in session)
A slot exists 48 hours from now but is already booked by another patient
actions: Attempt to book the already-occupied slot
expected: Response body indicates slot is unavailable
trace: R-HLT-024: decision table rule - time valid=true, slot available=false => 422
tests.executable:
import pytest
from datetime import datetime, timedelta, timezone

def test_schedule_appointment_unavailable_slot_returns_422(auth_client, occupied_slot_factory):
    slot_time = datetime.now(timezone.utc) + timedelta(hours=48)
    slot_id = occupied_slot_factory(slot_time)

    response = auth_client.post(
        "/appointments",
        json={"slot_id": slot_id}
    )

    assert response.status_code == 422, f"Expected 422 for occupied slot, got {response.status_code}"
    body = response.json()
    error_text = str(body).lower()
    assert "unavailable" in error_text or "conflict" in error_text or "booked" in error_text

tests.name: test_schedule_appointment_unauthenticated_returns_401
preconditions: A valid future slot is available 48 hours from now
actions: Include a valid slot_id 48 hours in the future in the request body
expected: Response body contains an authentication error message
trace: R-HLT-024: unauthenticated request must not reach booked state
tests.executable:
import pytest
from datetime import datetime, timedelta, timezone

def test_schedule_appointment_unauthenticated_returns_401(anon_client, available_slot_factory, appointment_list_admin):
    slot_time = datetime.now(timezone.utc) + timedelta(hours=48)
    slot_id = available_slot_factory(slot_time)

    response = anon_client.post(
        "/appointments",
        json={"slot_id": slot_id}
    )

    assert response.status_code == 401, f"Expected 401 for unauthenticated request, got {response.status_code}"
    body = response.json()
    assert "error" in body or "detail" in body or "message" in body

    all_appointments = appointment_list_admin()
    assert not any(a["slot_id"] == slot_id for a in all_appointments), "No appointment must be created for unauthenticated user"
